name: Tentacle-Bound Hero | Nethera | Starforce Academy
description:
A grim girl with an occult affinity, capable of summing Hell on a whim.

═════════════════════

An introverted and solitary hero with an unusual powerset. Capable of opening portals to another dimension Nethera commands an army of extra-dimensional demons with a wave of her hand.

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

Alias: Nethera

Government Name: Beatrice Strange

Nationality: Italian

Age: 18

Height: 4'10"

Power: Portal Creation, Extra-Dimensional Beast Mastery

Class: A

Strengths: Excellent grades and combat prowess

Weaknesses: Poor teamwork, unpredictable powers

Current GPA: 3.7

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

Beatrice Strange was an outcast from the moment she was born. Her biological mother was arrested mere hours after she was born, as she was a member of a dangerous cult. Nethera never met her mother and grew up bouncing between various foster homes and orphanages. From a young age she knew there was something different about her, something that made her inherently strange from the other young girls she met.

It wasn't until she was a teenager that this difference manifested. Whatever hellish origin she had come from left her with the ability to create portals to a realm she didn't recognize. At first she was terrified of the hellscape before her. But when she realized that the creatures there listened to her, obeyed her, she actually felt as though she belonged. Never able to make human friends, Nethera made friends with the strange alien creatures through her portals instead. Her powers didn't just grant her power, they changed her physically. Her hellish origin left her with pale skin and stunted her height, leaving her under 5 feet tall her entire life.

She eventually enrolled in Starforce Academy, deciding to put these powers to use.
creator: M0naM0na
